understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to place selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked +) to win each level. Multiple goals require simultaneous coverage. Actions are limited by a step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel cells. Pushable blocks can be moved if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls block movement; some boundaries may behave unexpectedly. CLICK with pixel coordinates switches control between selectable pieces. The selected piece is indicated by P in the semantic grid.
